caption: A young man with dark skin and short curly hair is seen in a close-up shot against a blurred outdoor background of green grass and light-colored structures. He wears a dark, puffer-style jacket with a high collar. As the sequence progresses, he maintains a steady gaze toward the camera with a serious facial expression, though his mouth moves slightly as he speaks. White text is centered over the lower portion of the image. In the first three frames, the text reads, "My name is Doums,". In the final frame, the text changes to "I fled the atrocities committed by rebel groups in the Congo." The lighting is soft and natural, and the camera remains stationary throughout the clip, focusing exclusively on the man's face and shoulders.
